title: Amscan Anagram 2302001 - Bubble Gum Pink Foil Heart Balloon - 18 Inch (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Heart shaped balloon in a bubble-gum pink finish
Simply pair with complimentary foil balloons to create a stunning balloon bouquet
Foil balloons filled with helium will last approximately 3 days
description: Foil balloons are available in an array of patterns, designs, colours and characters - with a shimmering finish they are sure to dazzle any party. Pair with similar foils or latex balloons to create an eye-catching balloon bouquet Do not forget a balloon weight and ribbon to complete the look. These foils are versatile and can match any party theme or colour scheme, either on their own or as a bouquet, making them a truly must have for a party display.
